subcodes.first_line: O thou beloved of My heart! Praised be God that thou hast attained unto His infinite bounties and been enabled to make mention of Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حبیب فوادی لله الحمد بعنایات لانهایات الهی فائز شدید و بذکرش موفق گشتید و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat], @obedience to and respect for government authority, @call to action
